result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 18:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS event_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
), owner_change_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_events
  GROUP BY case_id
), single_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN owner_change_counts occ ON occ.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND COALESCE(occ.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), agent_case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases where agent was involved either as initial owner (case.ownerid) or via owner assignment history (new owner)
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'

    UNION

    SELECT oe.new_owner AS owner_id, oe.case_id
    FROM owner_events oe
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = oe.case_id
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND oe.new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    soc.ownerid AS agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (soc.closeddate - soc.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM single_owner_cases soc
  GROUP BY soc.ownerid
)
SELECT aht.agent_id
FROM agent_aht aht
JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.owner_id = aht.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY aht.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS event_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
), owner_change_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_events
  GROUP BY case_id
), single_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN owner_change_counts occ ON occ.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND COALESCE(occ.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), agent_case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases where agent was involved either as initial owner (case.ownerid) or via owner assignment history (new owner)
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'

    UNION

    SELECT oe.new_owner AS owner_id, oe.case_id
    FROM owner_events oe
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = oe.case_id
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND oe.new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    soc.ownerid AS agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (soc.closeddate - soc.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM single_owner_cases soc
  GROUP BY soc.ownerid
)
SELECT aht.agent_id
FROM agent_aht aht
JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.owner_id = aht.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY aht.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS event_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
), owner_change_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_events
  GROUP BY case_id
), single_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN owner_change_counts occ ON occ.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND COALESCE(occ.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), agent_case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases where agent was involved either as initial owner (case.ownerid) or via owner assignment history (new owner)
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'

    UNION

    SELECT oe.new_owner AS owner_id, oe.case_id
    FROM owner_events oe
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = oe.case_id
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND oe.new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    soc.ownerid AS agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (soc.closeddate - soc.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM single_owner_cases soc
  GROUP BY soc.ownerid
)
SELECT aht.agent_id
FROM agent_aht aht
JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.owner_id = aht.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY aht.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS event_time,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
), owner_change_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_events
  GROUP BY case_id
), single_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid, c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN owner_change_counts occ ON occ.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND COALESCE(occ.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), agent_case_counts_all AS (
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'

    UNION

    SELECT oe.new_owner AS owner_id, oe.case_id
    FROM owner_events oe
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = oe.case_id
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
      AND oe.new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    soc.ownerid AS agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (soc.closed_ts - soc.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM single_owner_cases soc
  GROUP BY soc.ownerid
)
SELECT aht.agent_id
FROM agent_aht aht
JOIN agent_case_counts_all acc ON acc.owner_id = aht.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY aht.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
